expectations.text: Identifies pull_request_target + checkout of PR head as code injection risk
expectations.evidence: Finding 1 (Critical): Explains pull_request_target + head SHA checkout executes arbitrary code from fork in privileged context

expectations.text: Flags write-all permissions as overly broad
expectations.evidence: Finding 2 (High): Identifies write-all as overly permissive, recommends pull-requests: write

expectations.text: Catches command injection via PR title interpolation in run: block
expectations.evidence: Finding 3 (High): Shows injection payload via PR title, recommends env variable
Finding 4 (Medium): Identifies @main as mutable, recommends SHA pinning
